column1: # Bisect why test1 8x8 2d_seg2 hangs at Level 0 with the v5 epoch fix
# Columns: test_name | grid_rows | num_pes | impl | golden_dir | max_minutes
# Probe A: SOLO test1 8x8 (no preceding rows). Rules out matrix
# Probe B: 8-row col chain ONLY. num_cols=1, num_rows=8 means row
#          barrier short-circuits, only the col chain runs.
#          PASS => col chain at length 8 is fine in isolation.
#          HANG => col chain length 8 is the bug.
# Probe C: 8-col row chain ONLY. num_rows=1, num_cols=8 means col
#          barrier short-circuits, only the row chain runs.
#          PASS => row chain at length 8 is fine.
#          HANG => row chain length 8 is the bug.
